🧠 Modest ratings for this level; stepping up in class; modest recent form, on a declining curve; pedigree suits this trip and ground (Gun Runner); in-form trainer (William Haggas).

Southwell (AW) 20:30 AW

Sky Sports Racing Virgin 512 Handicap

20:30  |  AW  |  6f  |  Going: Standard  |  Class 6  |  3yo  |  11 runners  |  £3,664

📊 A competitive race — Marra Donna edges the rankings but the margins are tight (score 54.3). Key dangers: Taaklam (IRE) (course form), The Tunguska Event (course form), Obsidian Verse. No confirmed front-runners — pace may be modest, favouring those who race prominently.
Pace: Race conditions slightly suit ▶ Prominents (IV 1.37) Track favours ⚡ Front Runners (IV 1.44) No confirmed front-runners, but the track favours pace — whoever makes the running gains a positional edge

1 Marra Donna ↑↑ 5 ·· Cotai Glory / Kodiac ▼ 1.3 9-7 (-2) Sean D Bowen Ollie Sangster 73 70 9-3332 54.3 21.8% 4.6 5.5 2.88 -16.6pp
📰 Consistent; ran best race last time when only just failing to reel in the winner at Lingfield (5f; in this newly applied equipment); no issue with this extra furlong and the form of that race was given a boost when the fourth won at Bath; possible.
🧠 Model's top pick. Modest ratings for this level; on an improving trajectory; breeding is a slight negative for these conditions (Cotai Glory); good course record, in-form trainer (Ollie Sangster); significant steamer today (4/1 → 7/4, 56% shorter); market price confirms model confidence.
2 Taaklam (IRE) 8 ·· Mehmas / Bated Breath 3.0 9-7 (-2) Oisin McSweeney Harriet Bethell 72 68 7853-3 53.4 19.7% 5.1 5.5 5.50 -0.1pp
📰 Ex-Ed Walker; couldn't cling on when third on stable debut at Newcastle (6f, AW) 17 days ago, with Carnation Queen fifth; a hood is now applied, presumably to curb a free-going nature; Harriet Bethell has been among the winners in recent weeks.
🧠 Main danger. Modest ratings for this level; modest recent form, on an improving trajectory; good course record, in-form trainer (Harriet Bethell).

        "spotlight": "Went close at Newcastle (1m, AW) in March on second handicap start and he's of interest on that form, but he was then a soundly beaten fourth of ten at Musselburgh (1m, good) this month on his first run on turf; now 0-6."

        "cd": "",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed promise at Kempton in November before his second of eight in novice at Newcastle (7f, AW) one month later; no match for the winner (useful since) in the latter but ran on well and shaped encouragingly."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Adamlyi (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "49",

        "dam_sire": "Redoute's Choice",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "15.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.48",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-13.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kingman half-brother to Mujtaba (Group-placed 7.5f-1m2f; RPR 118); gambled-on co-favourite for maiden at Newmarket (7f, good to firm) last September but ended up fifth of eight, running green; very early days and it will be interesting to see if his backers return."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Fahidi (IRE)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "77",

        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "54.2",

        "fair_odds": "7.45",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Some market support when showing fair form in a maiden at Sandown (7f, good) last July and novice at Haydock (1m, good) in September; carries head high but still enters calculations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Alpine Culture (GB)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "80",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "4-3",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Medaglia d'Oro",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "53.1",
        "model_pct": "12.6%",
        "fair_odds": "7.96",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved when third of eight in maiden at Newmarket (7f, good; 10-1) 16 days ago, always prominent and just ahead of Kimbara; that's probably the best form in this line-up and it looks as if 1m will help."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Venetian Lion",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Royal Applause",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "53.0",
        "model_pct": "12.5%",
        "fair_odds": "7.98",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "By St Mark's Basilica; tenth foal; closely related to Group-placed 7.5f AW 2yo winner Golden Crown (RPR 104), half-brother to seven winners including Forest Of Dean (1m2f, including Group 3; 116), English Oak (7f/1m; 114) and Crown Of Oaks (1m/1m2f; 107); dam 6f/1m winner (98); withdrawn with self certificates in September and 12 days ago; newcomer to note."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Kimbara (GB)",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Richard Spencer",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "44",

        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "48.4",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.55",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only fourth of five at Newcastle (6f, AW) on debut in March but much better when about 3l fourth of eight in maiden at Newmarket (7f, good; 50-1) 16 days ago, just over 1l behind Alpine Culture; that puts him in the mix and he can probably improve again."
      },

        "rank": 7,

        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dam 7f 2yo/1m Listed winner who was runner-up in 1,000 Guineas; 18-1 from 12-1, faded into sixth of ten in maiden at Leicester (1m2f, good) last April; left Richard Hannon for 25,000gns in July, before gelding and wind operations early this year; work to do."

    "race_name": "Start Racing TV Free Trial Now Fillies' Novice Stakes (GBB Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "6f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "high",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Confide In Me",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Jack Jones",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "58.9",
        "model_pct": "26.9%",
        "fair_odds": "3.72",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-10.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Unraced dam from a good Cheveley Park family but didn't make the track for them and bought for 2,500gns last December; 9-1 when winning on this month's debut at Southwell (7f, AW), doing well to come from further behind than the other principals in a slowly run race; respected under 7lb penalty."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Egotistical (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Roger Varian",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "79",
        "or": "70",
        "form": "3-23",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Medicean",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "23.2%",
        "fair_odds": "4.31",
        "best_dec": "2.25",
        "edge": "-22.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed on first two starts in the winter and improved form when close third on recent turf debut at Nottingham (6f, good); she wasn't stopping at the line last time and there's every chance she'll stay 7f; key player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Viviana",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
        "sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "49.7",
        "model_pct": "13.6%",
        "fair_odds": "7.35",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second foal; dam 6f/7f maiden (RPR 60), sister to 5f/6f Group 3 winner Judicial, half-sister to Nunthorpe winner Marsha, out of 5f 2yo Listed winner from family of top miler Soviet Song; no surprise to see a big run on debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Why Because (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "Paul Midgley",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "71",
        "form": "9/445-",
        "sire": "New Bay",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "45.4",
        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.07",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-4 for Harry Charlton; changed hands twice since, for 6,000gns on December 1 and 1,000gns on December 11; her best form reads well in today's context and she's not ruled out on her stable debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Highfield Jewel (IRE)",
        "jockey": "-",
        "trainer": "Sara Ender",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "55",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "6-4",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Uncle Mo",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "44.6",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.69",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed some ability at Southwell this winter on her first two starts (7f/6f, AW) but not enough to suggest she's the one to be on today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Maldevious (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Shay Farmer(7)",
        "trainer": "Brian Ellison",
        "ts": "37",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "66",

        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-13",
        "score": "44.3",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.89",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-4.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Eight-race maiden who was down the field at Musselburgh (7f, good) 18 days ago but that may have come too soon, just two days after her close fourth of 15 at Thirsk (6f, good); stays 7f and might not be far away."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Prima Domina (GB)",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "-",

        "fair_odds": "12.72",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kept on for second on debut at Newcastle (6f, AW) last October, beaten about 5l at 12-1, then reportedly lost her action when well beaten there (6f) at 25-1; she's unexposed and it's possible 7f will suit, but others have more substance to their claims."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Lingfield (AW)",

    "draw_bias": "low",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "stall": 3,

        "score": "48.7",
        "model_pct": "18.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.32",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "+2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Pretty consistent last spring-autumn but doesn't win very often and made a low-key reappearance over C&D last month; needs to have taken significant benefit from that recent outing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Porfin (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Connor Planas(3)",
        "trainer": "Phil McEntee",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "51",
        "form": "235304",

        "dam_sire": "Marju",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "16.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.95",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "11 wins, the latest off basement mark over C&D in January; largely consistent since and may benefit from this drop back in trip, having raced too freely when fourth over 7f here on latest outing; back from two-month break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Mintana",
        "jockey": "Tom Kiely-Marshall(5)",
        "trainer": "James Evans",
        "ts": "49",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "-52154",

        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "46.9",
        "model_pct": "13.0%",
        "fair_odds": "7.70",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just held on to win 7f classified here in February but found things a bit tougher in her two subsequent handicaps (7f/6f); usual cheekpieces (left off last time) are refitted; others look stronger."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Alashos",
        "jockey": "William Carson",
        "trainer": "Chris Gordon",
        "ts": "59",
        "rpr": "65",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "4-5448",

        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "45.9",
        "model_pct": "10.7%",
        "fair_odds": "9.34",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't fire over 7f here last month and is now 0-9 for Chris Gordon but keeping-on fourth of 12 at Kempton (6f) two starts ago was a pretty good effort and he remains on a good mark; considered, despite awkward draw."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Harry Brown (GB)",

        "trainer": "Peter Crate",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "66",
        "or": "55",

        "dam_sire": "Elzaam",
        "stall": 9,

        "model_pct": "9.9%",
        "fair_odds": "10.13",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four-time C&D winner, most recently off 3lb higher in October; absent since two below-par runs in February and not one to rely upon heavily but still features prominently in calculations."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "65",

        "stall": 1,

        "fair_odds": "11.67",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+2.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins this year, both in Wolverhampton classified races (5f/6f); probably needs to find something extra in this handicap, though, and below form on last two starts (both 5f)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Mighty Ruler",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Opened account with hard-fought 7f course win off today's mark in January but yet to make any further progress and was unable to land a telling blow when dropped back to 6f at Kempton last month."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last season's campaign fizzled out but he made a fairly encouraging return in 6f Wolverhampton classified last month, keeping on steadily from the rear to finish in midfield; now 6lb lower than for last spring's win at Brighton (6f, good); a possible."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Better known as a 7f/1m performer but her latest win (last August) was gained over 6f; predictably found 5f too sharp here last month but finished well and wasn't beaten far; back up in trip today and well handicapped; interesting."
      }
    ]

  {

    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Alice De Clare",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "72",
        "rpr": "81",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "9742",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Maxios",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "56.7",
        "model_pct": "34.8%",
        "fair_odds": "2.88",
        "best_dec": "1.91",
        "edge": "-19.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Looked an interesting handicap debutante at Beverley (1m2f, good to firm) last Thursday and so it proved, as she made a big move from rear to lead over 1f out but was beaten a neck; due to go up 7lb after this, so has a good chance if she's in the same form on this quick return to action."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sports Day (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "45",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "597-3",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "16.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.97",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-14.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Gelded after 2yo campaign and improved when a close, always-prominent third of eight here (1m, good) on handicap/seasonal debut 19 days ago, shaping as if 1m2f may well help; major player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "trainer": "Marco Botti",
        "ts": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "15.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.38",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a Lingfield novice (1m, AW) in December on second start and narrowly beaten on handicap debut at Wolverhampton (8.5f, AW) in January; however, this turf debut with first-time cheekpieces requires him to bounce back from a lesser show in late January."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Grindleton (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Daniel & Claire Kubler",
        "ts": "41",
        "rpr": "68",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "643-",
        "sire": "Ribchester",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "47.0",
        "model_pct": "11.9%",
        "fair_odds": "8.39",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not far away at Pontefract or Bath (again 1m on good to soft) last autumn on his second and third starts; makes his handicap debut and some improvement should be forthcoming this season."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Time To Sparkle",
        "jockey": "J F Egan",
        "trainer": "James Keane",
        "ts": "35",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "7-4915",
        "sire": "Time Test",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.76",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Saddle slipped three starts ago but she made amends with a short-head win at Wolverhampton (8.6f, AW) in March; not discredited in fifth of eight here (1m, good) 19 days ago but she raced too freely and didn't shape as well as third-placed Sports Day."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Heart Sign",
        "jockey": "Ross Coakley",
        "trainer": "Jack Morland",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "64",
        "form": "53-594",
        "sire": "Masar",
        "dam_sire": "Universal",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "42.2",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.35",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not beaten far on second or third starts but he's not made a serious impact since in his two handicaps (probably stayed 1m2f last time); this is his first turf race since debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "King's Courtier",
        "jockey": "Mason Paetel(5)",
        "trainer": "Julia & Shelley Birkett",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "64",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "000-4",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "40.0",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.40",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed little in three starts last year (6f-1m) but much better when fourth of eight when 66-1 in maiden at Wolverhampton (9.4f, AW) three weeks ago; needs to build on that on this handicap debut."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Her 18 races have yielded just one win but that came over C&D (good to firm) last August; close third of 14 at Doncaster last Friday (5f, good to firm; one place behind Beerwah) and she may again be firmly involved."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "edge": "-12.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just one win from his 17 starts but that came last September at Beverley and he was beaten just a neck on his reappearance at Doncaster (5f, good to firm) last Friday; there's every chance he'll be bang there once more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two-time course winner, including this race in 2024, and she posted wins at Thirsk and Nottingham last July; lacks a recent run but can be in the mix if fully tuned up."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "ts": "54",

        "fair_odds": "12.67",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last season ended with two disappointing runs and there was no return to form on his recent reappearance; however, he may have needed that latest outing and this two-time C&D winner is back down to last September's last winning mark; not written off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,

        "fair_odds": "12.93",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "5f wins on AW/turf in August/September last year and he's on a handy mark on that form; however, his campaign concluded with two disappointing runs and he needs to get back on track on this reappearance outing."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four wins last June/July (5f-7f) and this front-runner returned to form when third at Catterick (6f, good) three weeks ago on her second start of the season; she can make another bold bid."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "On a reduced mark and he showed some spark last November; however, he was disappointing in the main in the second half of last year and finished down the field on his last two starts; returns with something to prove."

      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Yarmouth",
    "time": "16:25",
    "race_name": "Download The At The Races App Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "A Major Payne (GB)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "Michael Bell",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "7353-3",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Diesis",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "59.2",
        "model_pct": "33.0%",
        "fair_odds": "3.03",
        "best_dec": "2.75",
        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-15 but involved in some tight finishes at 1m and also over C&D recently on his second go at 1m2f (one place ahead of Beach Point); off the same mark, he should be seriously involved if the returning cheekpieces (worn on penultimate start last term, ran creditably) don't have a negative effect."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Beach Point (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Knight",
        "ts": "80",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "1755-4",
        "sire": "Blue Point",
        "dam_sire": "Power",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "58.5",
        "model_pct": "28.6%",
        "fair_odds": "3.50",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "+5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won at Sandown (1m2f) last summer in first two starts after cheekpieces were refitted; respectable in two of four starts since, including over C&D recently when finishing on the heels of A Major Payne; should be competitive."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Golden Horse (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "43",
        "rpr": "88",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "316-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "55.4",
        "model_pct": "15.8%",
        "fair_odds": "6.32",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-9.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "425,000gns yearling by Sea The Stars; fair form last July-September on all three starts, though apparently best when off the mark in a weak race at Hamilton (1m, good; made all) on second occasion; well beaten in a 1m2f Newmarket novice on final outing; after only three races, this handicap debutant could still be capable of better but it is needed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Lordsbridge Blu",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "S Woods",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "091-24",
        "sire": "Havana Grey",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "54.0",
        "model_pct": "12.0%",
        "fair_odds": "8.33",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-6.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1-15 in handicaps, with the win on Lingfield AW (AW) last November but he's often been thereabouts, including on turf; bang there on Wolverhampton AW on both outings this term, the latest just three days ago; player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Clouds Hill (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jack Callan(3)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "2217-",
        "sire": "Cracksman",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "53.4",
        "model_pct": "10.6%",
        "fair_odds": "9.43",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second on turf last April (good) and June (good to firm) before a short-priced AW win at Newcastle in November, all over 1m; while not discredited in form terms on handicap debut at Kempton (1m, AW; 10-1) in December, he managed only seventh of 11 and showed that overall improvement is needed; lightly raced and 1m2f should be within reach."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Redcar",
    "time": "16:30",
    "race_name": "Racing TV Free Trial Handicap (GBBPlus Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 3",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Fierce Fortitude",
        "jockey": "Rowan Scott",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "86",
        "form": "4321-2",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "60.7",
        "model_pct": "24.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.04",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "+0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the fourth attempt in a maiden at Brighton (7f, good to firm) last September and he reappeared with a close second on last month's handicap debut at Wolverhampton (9.4f, AW); that latest form reads well and this unexposed 4yo is a major player up 2lb."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "James McHenry (GB)",
        "jockey": "Callum Rodriguez",
        "trainer": "Edward Bethell",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "90",
        "form": "/0-945",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Verglas",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "58.0",
        "model_pct": "15.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.41",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up in the Cambridgeshire (1m1f) in September 2024 and he's raced just four times since; denied clear run when keeping on for fifth of 12 at Musselburgh (1m1f, good) recently and the return to 1m2f is worth a go; could have a part to play in first-time cheekpieces."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Raulin (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Nolan",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "4116-7",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "57.7",
        "model_pct": "14.6%",
        "fair_odds": "6.83",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went up the weights having won three times last year, including C&D (good to firm) in May; unplaced on final start last term and same story on recent reappearance, but he may have needed that latest run and is not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Project Geofin (GB)",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Geoff Oldroyd",
        "ts": "89",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "16429-",
        "sire": "Calyx",
        "dam_sire": "Excellent Art",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "12.8%",
        "fair_odds": "7.79",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Tailed off last November when last seen but enjoyed a good season in the main otherwise, winning two in a row in the summer and finishing second over C&D (good) on his penultimate start; his record when fresh in the spring is pretty decent and he's one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ammes",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "104",
        "or": "89",
        "form": "6523-6",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "55.6",
        "model_pct": "10.2%",
        "fair_odds": "9.79",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-10.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Caught wide when down the field at Lingfield in February on last Flat start and when well beaten over hurdles on his last two runs he was contesting hot 4yo races; on a competitive mark on last summer's Flat form and he was a Listed hurdle runner-up in October; not ruled out back in this code."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Thunder Wonder",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "84",
        "form": "700-04",
        "sire": "Night Of Thunder",
        "dam_sire": "Casamento",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "53.2",
        "model_pct": "6.6%",
        "fair_odds": "15.07",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well handicapped on last season's peak efforts and he took a step back in the right direction when fourth of 12 at Musselburgh (1m1f, good) recently; however, that track brings out the best in him, he needs to build on that latest run, and he's unproven at 1m2f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Austrian Theory (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "96",
        "rpr": "106",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "0023-5",
        "sire": "Awtaad",
        "dam_sire": "Persian Bold",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "6.3%",
        "fair_odds": "15.89",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-6.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-10 last year but placed on final two runs of the season last autumn and he didn't run badly at Ripon a fortnight ago on his reappearance; his last win came off this mark and he could improve for that recent outing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Urban Road",
        "jockey": "Rhys Elliott(5)",
        "trainer": "Alan Brown",
        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "102",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "744562",
        "sire": "Monsieur Bond",
        "dam_sire": "American Post",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-5",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.12",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beaten on his last 13 starts going back to last February and eight of his nine wins have come on AW; can be slowly away but that didn't stop him finishing second over C&D (good to firm) last Monday when back up in trip; has the same mark today and could well be in the mix once more."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Diderot (GB)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Sexton",
        "trainer": "Julie Camacho",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "100",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "/9-7R6",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Zamindar",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "28.45",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not the force of old on AW and he refused to race at Lingfield in February; made it 0-7 on turf when 5l sixth of nine here (1m, good to firm) last Monday but that wasn't devoid of promise as he was denied a clear run and kept on pretty nicely; he's not ruled out each-way back up in trip."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Lingfield (AW)",

    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "51",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "65",

        "edge": "+11.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Came good with two wins (one over C&D) in March; still in good form but was allowed to set steady fractions when making the frame on her last two appearances (9.4f/C&D) and others in this field may have more potential."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Ammoony",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "Tom Clover",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "54-2",
        "sire": "Zarak",
        "dam_sire": "Shakespearean",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "55.1",
        "model_pct": "19.4%",
        "fair_odds": "5.14",
        "best_dec": "2.50",
        "edge": "-21.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Appeared to show improvement when close second of four behind odds-on favourite on seasonal debut at Wolverhampton (8.6f) last month, albeit with the form of that steadily run race quite tricky to assess; upped in trip for this handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Willow Wood (IRE)",
        "jockey": "George Downing",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "48",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "645-",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-11",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "13.6%",
        "fair_odds": "7.36",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-0.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well-bred filly; didn't look anything special in her three 2yo races at around 1m but has plenty of scope for improvement in middle-distance handicaps this year; interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Flightofthephoenix (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Charles Hills",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "6353-7",
        "sire": "Phoenix Of Spain",
        "dam_sire": "Tiz Wonderful",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "51.0",
        "model_pct": "11.9%",
        "fair_odds": "8.41",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Still a maiden after ten starts but she's well handicapped on some of last year's placed form and endured a wide trip when only seventh over C&D in January on latest outing; contender if tuned up after break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Ghost Story (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "John Butler",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "/6123-",
        "sire": "Waldgeist",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-1",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "9.5%",
        "fair_odds": "10.56",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In good form on soft turf during light campaign last year, most notably when winning over today's trip at Windsor; should be okay back on Polytrack but has fitness to prove after six-month break; market helpful."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Mythical Bird (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Hughie Morrison",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "33446-",
        "sire": "Phoenix Of Spain",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "48.1",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.83",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-7.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ten-race maiden; made the frame three consecutive times on AW in September/October (1m-1m2f) and is quite well handicapped on those efforts but not seen since a lesser run at the end of October."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Guendolen (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kaiya Fraser",
        "trainer": "Harry Eustace",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "54467-",
        "sire": "Sir Percy",
        "dam_sire": "Selkirk",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "7.0%",
        "fair_odds": "14.39",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Absent since two below-par turf runs in September but an emphatic winner when fresh last April and begins her new campaign from a workable mark; placed on only AW start (in Tapeta in 2024); no surprise if she features."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Gnocchi",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "James Horton",
        "ts": "40",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "4499-7",
        "sire": "Supremacy",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-7",
        "score": "41.9",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "24.94",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+0.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran as though something was amiss on nursery debut in the autumn (6f) but last month's reappearance at Kempton (1m) was not devoid of promise; upped in trip again here; not out of this if that recent run brought her on."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Lady McC (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ashley Lewis(5)",
        "trainer": "Daniel Steele",
        "ts": "8",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "25580-",
        "sire": "Le Havre",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "10-2",
        "score": "39.8",
        "model_pct": "3.1%",
        "fair_odds": "32.09",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-5 in Ireland last year and absent since heavy defeat in AW claimer in October; fitted with tongue-tie for this stable debut; others have much less to prove."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Yarmouth",
    "time": "16:57",
    "race_name": "Sky Sports Virgin 512 Fillies' Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Moonshine",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "49",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "32-21",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Grand Reward",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "63.7",
        "model_pct": "33.1%",
        "fair_odds": "3.02",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "+7.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Second at 2-5 and evens after catching the eye on Newbury debut (finished third) but she made no mistake in a four-runner novice at Kempton (6f, AW) six weeks ago and the odds-on runner-up won next time; return to 7f looks in order and, although this handicap debut is more of a test, she seems to have a competitive mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Zighy (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Billy Loughnane",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3221-1",
        "sire": "Mehmas",
        "dam_sire": "Cape Cross",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "56.5",
        "model_pct": "12.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.14",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Steadily going the right way, on last two starts winning in a novice at Wolverhampton in November and handicap debut at Southwell 15 days ago; both of those were 6f on AW under good claimer Jack Callan; up 6lb but strength at the finish last time makes 7f today an appealing option."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Brisk Symphony (IRE)",
        "jockey": "George Wood",
        "trainer": "Jonathan Portman",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "61148-",
        "sire": "Sergei Prokofiev",
        "dam_sire": "Camacho",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.25",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "6f maiden and novice winner on good to firm last June/July; ran further good races when fourth of 12 in a Doncaster nursery (6.5f, good to soft) and eighth in a Newmarket Listed race (6f, good); better is needed over this new trip on return but her stable is in fine form, including with two recent 3yo reappearance winners."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "You'll Think Of Me (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "42",
        "rpr": "87",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "62331-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "No Nay Never",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "56.2",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.51",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Failed to win in four runs for Donnacha O'Brien in Ireland but she showed progressive form for him and made a winning debut for new yard in five-runner novice at Kempton (6f, AW) in December; the latter was at 1-3, admittedly, but she stays 7f and goes on the shortlist."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Angels' Share (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Knight",
        "ts": "52",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "72110-",
        "sire": "Harry Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "54.7",
        "model_pct": "9.6%",
        "fair_odds": "10.43",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7f on Lingfield AW for her quick double late last summer in a maiden and nursery, both from the front; did those in some style but found a hot fillies' race at Goodwood (7f, good to soft) in September far too demanding; player if back to her best for a yard that seems to be in good form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Wetsand",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "86",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "200-77",
        "sire": "Acclamation",
        "dam_sire": "Raven's Pass",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "54.2",
        "model_pct": "8.9%",
        "fair_odds": "11.21",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In good form in her early starts on turf last year but soundly beaten facing much stiffer tasks on next two outings; remained out of form this season in 10.5f Listed race at Saint-Cloud (heavy) and 7f handicap at Southwell (AW) and that's a major worry."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Here I Bow (FR)",
        "jockey": "Ross Coakley",
        "trainer": "Oli Rix",
        "ts": "68",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "16652-",
        "sire": "Bow Creek",
        "dam_sire": "Rio De La Plata",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.6",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.14",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Third foal; dam lightly raced, placed in Germany at 1m1f, out of unraced half-sister to German 1m Group 2 and US 1m2f Grade 2 winner Sumitas; 7f maiden win last June from seven starts in France for Florian Guyander; peak efforts on softer than good; marked improvement is seemingly needed on British debut; rookie trainer's reappearance winner this month was heavily backed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Harlequin Angel (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Alexandra Egan(7)",
        "trainer": "Jane Chapple-Hyam",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "83",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "02310-",
        "sire": "Space Blues",
        "dam_sire": "Verglas",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "6.0%",
        "fair_odds": "16.69",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Outclassed in a valuable sales race in October but progressive going into that, culminating in a front-running win on handicap debut at Newmarket (7f, good to firm); 5lb higher for this return and 7lb claimer is recruited."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Redcar",
    "time": "17:02",
    "race_name": "Watch Race Replays At racingtv.com Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m2f",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "King Of Berkshire",
        "jockey": "P J McDonald",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "90",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "37-42",
        "sire": "Camelot",
        "dam_sire": "Aqlaam",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "60.1",
        "model_pct": "34.9%",
        "fair_odds": "2.86",
        "best_dec": "1.67",
        "edge": "-27.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Camelot colt who improved upon his 7f/1m maiden form when short-headed on recent handicap debut at Yarmouth (1m2f, good to firm), where he was nicely clear of the third; returns to action before a rise in the weights kicks in and he's a very strong candidate."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Sudbury Hill",
        "jockey": "Pierre-Louis Jamin",
        "trainer": "Harry Derham",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "84",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "065-23",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Mark Of Esteem",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "56.9",
        "model_pct": "26.0%",
        "fair_odds": "3.85",
        "best_dec": "3.50",
        "edge": "-6.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Went close on stable debut at Kempton (1m, AW) in February and again ran well when third of six at Lingfield (1m2f, AW) latest; however, it's possible he's better at a shorter trip and best form thus far has come on AW."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Just A Gambler",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Charlie Johnston",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "69",
        "form": "36-138",
        "sire": "St Mark's Basilica",
        "dam_sire": "Thewayyouare",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "49.8",
        "model_pct": "13.4%",
        "fair_odds": "7.45",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Soundly beaten when back on turf at Musselburgh (1m, good) this month but may have been unsuited by first-time cheekpieces (which are now left off); running well over 1m on AW previously, when shaping as though this longer trip may suit, and he's not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Fairydale (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "82",
        "or": "61",
        "form": "40755-",
        "sire": "Waldgeist",
        "dam_sire": "Sir Percy",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "8-9",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "10.04",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+3.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished held in fifth last September in her two nurseries (8.4f/1m); however, she showed signs of promise previously and, being by Waldgeist, the step up in trip may well prove to be a positive move on her reappearance, for which she wears first-time cheekpieces."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Red Rifle (GB)",
        "jockey": "Oliver Stammers",
        "trainer": "Grant Tuer",
        "ts": "45",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "0556-",
        "sire": "Tasleet",

        "fair_odds": "11.77",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Soundly beaten sixth of eight on nursery debut at Newcastle (1m, AW) last October but that doesn't tell the full story as he came home first of the three that raced on the near side; reappears with trainer in fine form and it will be no surprise to see him give a good account."
      },

        "rank": 6,

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "She's raced three times (7f-8.4f) and her most promising effort came when keeping on for third of five over 7f here last October on debut; this Ulysses filly could improve for the step up in trip on handicap debut and is one to watch in the betting."
      }
    ]
  },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Inconsistent ten-race maiden but she was runner-up over C&D last month and wasn't beaten far back on turf at Beverley (1m4f) last time; tongue-tie is now added and she's in the mix back up in trip."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Angelardo",
        "jockey": "Miss Pippa Brown(3)",
        "trainer": "Liam Bailey",
        "ts": "30",
        "rpr": "41",
        "or": "52",
        "form": "-72184",
        "sire": "Belardo",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "11-0",
        "score": "46.3",
        "model_pct": "10.7%",
        "fair_odds": "9.31",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the seventh attempt when forging clear at Newcastle (2m, Tapeta) last month but he's been well held on Polytrack and Tapeta since; has bit to prove again and he needs more progress in first-time blinkers; stablemate of Yakhabar."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Hiccups (GB)",
        "jockey": "Mr Cameron Hillhouse(5)",
        "trainer": "Tony Forbes",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "46",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "46124-",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Frankel",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "10-12",
        "score": "46.2",
        "model_pct": "10.6%",
        "fair_odds": "9.47",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Beat a Catterick specialist by a neck (1m6f, good) in September before ending last season with solid efforts in his final two runs for John Berry; has claims if he can pick where he left off but he doesn't have a great record when fresh and still has something to prove on AW."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Regal Glory",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "937240",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Medicean",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "10-8",
        "score": "44.7",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.80",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Record of 1-37 but she's run some good races this year, including when runner-up at Wolverhampton (1m6f) three weeks ago; her mark hasn't moved much this spring but she was tailed off when favourite here (2m) on Tuesday."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Star Of Jupiter (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Mr Jack Loughnane(7)",
        "trainer": "Mark Loughnane",
        "ts": "22",
        "rpr": "46",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "23446-",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "10-8",
        "score": "44.0",
        "model_pct": "6.8%",
        "fair_odds": "14.77",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-0.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just one win from 17 starts but he reached the frame on numerous occasions over 2m/2m1f in July-October last year; ended 2025 on a low note but he's well handicapped on his best form and needs watching in market after five months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Bronte Beach",
        "jockey": "Miss Brodie Hampson",
        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "47",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "-77778",
        "sire": "Le Havre",
        "dam_sire": "Dubawi",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "11-2",
        "score": "43.5",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.15",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six-race maiden who has not progressed and has form figures of 778 in three AW handicaps (1m/1m2f) this year; continues to drop down the weights but she needs a transformation at this new trip; hood added."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Cogital",
        "jockey": "Miss Jessica Llewellyn(5)",
        "trainer": "Bernard Llewellyn",
        "ts": "-4",
        "rpr": "45",
        "or": "54",
        "form": "1383-9",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "11-2",
        "score": "43.1",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.35",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Hard to predict and was out the back at Wolverhampton (1m4f) three weeks ago but he finished runner-up over hurdles at Chepstow (2m) last month and his last Flat win was off this mark (1m6f, good) last summer; comes with risks attached but he's not ruled out back up in trip; change of headgear."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Lawmans Blis (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Miss Megan Jordan",
        "trainer": "Joey Ramsden",
        "ts": "29",
        "rpr": "43",
        "or": "45",
        "form": "-28586",
        "sire": "Lawman",
        "dam_sire": "Soviet Star",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "10-7",
        "score": "41.6",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.44",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-8.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Back to form with a second here (1m3f) in January but that hasn't been a springboard to better things; returns for new yard after wind surgery but his last win was 13 months ago and others are more convincing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Parikarma",
        "jockey": "Miss Imogen Mathias(5)",
        "trainer": "Samuel Drinkwater",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "/0277/",
        "sire": "Canford Cliffs",
        "dam_sire": "Danehill Dancer",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "10-12",
        "score": "41.4",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.27",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-2.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six-time winner with three on the Flat and three over hurdles; returned after a lengthy absence in February but she's posted two respectable efforts over hurdles since; on dangerous mark back on the Flat but she's 0-21 on AW and others are preferred."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Prince Abu (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Miss Ellie Callwood(5)",
        "trainer": "L J Morgan",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "42",
        "or": "46",
        "form": "60/44-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Mr Greeley",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "10-8",
        "score": "40.2",
        "model_pct": "3.3%",
        "fair_odds": "30.34",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "-0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Triple course winner (1m6f/2m) but his last success was in December 2022 and he didn't pose a threat in just two runs last year; returns after 318 days off and he has some work to do back in trip; hood reapplied."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Fiftyshadesaresdev",
        "jockey": "Miss Becky Smith",
        "trainer": "Micky Hammond",
        "ts": "15",
        "rpr": "47",
        "or": "47",
        "form": "326-77",
        "sire": "Johnny Barnes",
        "dam_sire": "Tin Horse",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "10-9",
        "score": "38.4",
        "model_pct": "2.3%",
        "fair_odds": "43.44",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Placed on numerous occasions, including at Southwell, but remains a longstanding maiden and he's been beaten around 12l in his two runs this year; blinkers return and cheekpieces are removed."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Yarmouth",
    "time": "17:30",
    "race_name": "Eastern Power Systems 'Confined' Handicap (For horses Which Have Won No More Than One Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good To Firm",
    "class": "Class 5",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Del Corso",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "47",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "68",
        "form": "566-3",
        "sire": "Dubawi",
        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "54.3",
        "model_pct": "28.6%",
        "fair_odds": "3.50",
        "best_dec": "2.20",
        "edge": "-20.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Useful pedigree and he showed improved form when a close third of 12 on seasonal/handicap debut at Nottingham (1m, good) three weeks ago, favourite and mounting a strong challenge in the final 1f; up 3lb but strong chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Armstrong",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "George Boughey",
        "ts": "60",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "67",
        "form": "327-22",
        "sire": "Starman",
        "dam_sire": "Teofilo",
        "stall": 5,

        "rpr": "70",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "2367-1",
        "sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "dam_sire": "Sakhee's Secret",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "54.4",
        "model_pct": "33.9%",
        "fair_odds": "2.95",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "+16.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Overcame a wide draw to resume winning ways at Wolverhampton (9.4f; 22-1) a fortnight ago; that was her first win for 29 months and, while it's possible she'll strip fitter again, you couldn't be totally confident of a repeat from this 3lb higher mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "The Bay Warrior",
        "jockey": "Rose Dawes(5)",
        "trainer": "Mark Usher",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "59",
        "form": "9-9603",
        "sire": "The Gurkha",
        "dam_sire": "Acatenango",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "50.1",
        "model_pct": "17.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.82",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-5.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Dual C&D winner; has slipped to 6lb below his last winning mark (1m4f, Lingfield) and wasn't beaten far when having the run of the race under Rose Dawes at Wolverhampton (1m4f; third of seven, 7-2) last week; foolish to discount."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Le Pelerin (GB)",
        "jockey": "Curtis Wilson-Ruddock(7)",
        "trainer": "William Knight",
        "ts": "50",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "3307-0",
        "sire": "Sottsass",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "48.4",
        "model_pct": "13.1%",
        "fair_odds": "7.61",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden (0-11); twice placed on AW, including when third to Serious Look at Wolverhampton (9.4f; 10-1) last October; less effective since - eased 5lb in the weights - but could draw benefit from his Yarmouth comeback run (first outing since wind surgery)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Arranmore",
        "jockey": "Aiden Brookes",
        "trainer": "Micky Hammond",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "50",
        "form": "6-4451",
        "sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "dam_sire": "New Approach",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "47.3",
        "model_pct": "11.0%",
        "fair_odds": "9.09",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kept on well to score over C&D (16-1; from 3lb lower) five weeks ago; that came as a bit of a surprise, only his second win since August 2021, but the form was given a boost with the third (Moon Over The Sea) winning at Bath on Monday; needs considering."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Sisterandbrother (GB)",
        "jockey": "Alistair Rawlinson",
        "trainer": "Joey Ramsden",
        "ts": "56",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "3-5187",
        "sire": "Sixties Icon",
        "dam_sire": "Piccolo",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "9.1%",
        "fair_odds": "10.96",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-10.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "6-53; with Shaun Harris when scoring in first-time cheekpieces at Kempton (1m4f; 5-1) in January, that his first win for a year; met traffic problems, seventh of 12, on recent stable debut at Beverley (1m4f; 3-1 favourite); fair mark, with headgear return the relevant angle."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Recobella",
        "jockey": "Cam Hardie",
        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",
        "ts": "43",
        "rpr": "69",
        "or": "53",
        "form": "1277-3",
        "sire": "Recoletos",
        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "43.2",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.41",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "-8.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Classified stakes win at Nottingham (1m2f, good; 10-1) last July, before going close in a Class 6 0-55 at Beverley (5-4 favourite) six days later; finished season more low-key, but her Doncaster comeback third (1m2f; 16-1) gives her a shout."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "It's A Love Thing",
        "jockey": "Oisin McSweeney",
        "trainer": "Sam England",
        "ts": "53",
        "rpr": "71",
        "or": "57",
        "form": "8-6780",
        "sire": "Intrinsic",
        "dam_sire": "Kyllachy",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "42.6",
        "model_pct": "5.2%",
        "fair_odds": "19.09",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+1.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "7-47 on AW but has struggled for form since finishing third at Newcastle (1m, Class 5; from 12lb higher) last November; failed to beat a rival in each of his last two starts (9.4f/1m4f) so it's difficult to have confidence."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Cloudside Rock (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sean D Bowen",
        "trainer": "David Simcock",
        "ts": "44",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "74105-",
        "sire": "Rock Of Gibraltar",
        "dam_sire": "Sagamix",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "41.9",
        "model_pct": "4.7%",
        "fair_odds": "21.36",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-8.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made the breakthrough in a 0-55 at Ffos Las (1m4f, soft; 6-4 favourite) last August; failed to back that up in two subsequent starts, the latest when fifth of seven at Redcar (1m6f, good) in November; 2lb lower returned to AW (0-7) for seasonal reappearance."
      }
    ]
  },

  {
    "course": "Lingfield (AW)",
    "time": "18:10",
    "race_name": "Download The At The Races App Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "1m4f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 6",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 3,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Divot (GB)",
        "jockey": "Luke Morris",
        "trainer": "William Knight",
        "ts": "65",
        "rpr": "76",
        "or": "56",
        "form": "4723-2",
        "sire": "Footstepsinthesand",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "58.6",
        "model_pct": "23.8%",
        "fair_odds": "4.21",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Still seeking his first win after 13 attempts but he has finished second on three occasions, including at Wolverhampton on his seasonal return three weeks ago (1m4f; hooded first time); that was a costly reverse for those that backed him into 11-10f but he didn't do a great deal wrong and the subsequent wins of the first and third give the form some ballast; major player with the hood now discarded."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Imperial Cult (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "George Baker",
        "ts": "37",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "58",
        "form": "25833-",
        "sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "dam_sire": "Hat Trick",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "55.4",
        "model_pct": "16.8%",
        "fair_odds": "5.96",
        "best_dec": "3.75",
        "edge": "-10.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three times in the summer of 2024, including twice over C&D; several good runs in defeat last year and he starts out for George Baker (same owner) off a competitive mark; one to consider."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Upepo",
        "jockey": "Myla Coppins(7)",
        "trainer": "Tony Carroll",
        "ts": "54",
        "rpr": "77",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "8-0349",
        "sire": "Roaring Lion",
        "dam_sire": "Clodovil",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "54.9",
        "model_pct": "15.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.36",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well backed when winning over C&D in December off a 2lb lower mark (ridden by Myla Coppins); the odd solid effort since and he can't be ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Skimming Along (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Daniel Steele",
        "ts": "66",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "60",
        "form": "44102-",
        "sire": "Postponed",
        "dam_sire": "Danetime",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "53.5",
        "model_pct": "13.4%",
        "fair_odds": "7.44",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved for a step up in trip/switch to handicaps last summer, winning twice on turf at around this trip (good to firm and heavy) before ending 2025 with a close second at Chelmsford (1m6f); still has potential after just nine starts and he's an interesting contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Fullforward (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Hollie Doyle",
        "trainer": "Michael Madgwick",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "74",
        "or": "48",
        "form": "38804-",
        "sire": "Tamayuz",
        "dam_sire": "Street Cry",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "49.6",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.39",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Just low-level hurdle form on his last two starts; last year's Flat best, which came over C&D, would give him a squeak but others look stronger for win purposes."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Sir Patchy (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kieran O'Neill",
        "trainer": "Pat Phelan",
        "ts": "70",
        "rpr": "73",
        "or": "45",
        "form": "/2385-",
        "sire": "Sir Percy",
        "dam_sire": "Inchinor",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "8-5",
        "score": "48.6",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.81",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-10.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Still seeking his first win but he was placed twice in Kempton handicaps last October (1m/1m4f) after a lengthy layoff; 148-day absence small fry in comparison and he could still have a bigger effort in him."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Sonnerie Power",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "David Killahena & Graeme McPherson",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "63",
        "form": "7-1576",
        "sire": "Almanzor",
        "dam_sire": "Giant's Causeway",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "46.8",
        "model_pct": "6.4%",
        "fair_odds": "15.60",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Comfortable success at Kempton on his stable debut in January (1m3f); solid efforts in defeat since and this is a good deal weaker than the C&D handicap in which he finished sixth (of 15) on Good Friday; contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Lunar Power (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rhys Clutterbuck",
        "trainer": "Laura Mongan",
        "ts": "24",
        "rpr": "75",
        "or": "62",
        "form": "2765-5",
        "sire": "Power",
        "dam_sire": "Dr Fong",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "42.1",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.55",

        "spotlight": "Losing run stretches back to May 2023 (hurdles); ended 2025 with some modest efforts for James Owen and fared little better when fifth of seven on his stable debut 11 weeks ago (2m, Polytrack); enough to prove."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Eye-catching second on his Nottingham debut (8.3f, heavy) in October and he built on that with a near-miss on his reappearance here (1m4f) 25 days ago; had some steering issues in that race but he finished well for a clear second and sets the standard on that form; key player."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "fair_odds": "4.99",
        "best_dec": "7.00",
        "edge": "+3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sixties Icon half-brother to three winners including Frenzified (9.5f-1m4f including AW/US; RPR 103); beaten 8l when a never-dangerous fourth at Wolverhampton (9.4f, Tapeta) in December but that was an encouraging start behind some useful rivals; should know more this time and he's a likely improver upped in trip after a break."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "edge": "+4.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Half-sister to some useful winners and she's out of a Listed-placed 1m2f winner (RPR 99); runner-up on Southwell debut (1m) in September and was a fair third at Wolverhampton (8.6f) two months later; needs to find improvement after five months off but it's still early days and this step up in trip could help; shortlisted."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed promise with his late headway in two runs at Bath (1m, good to soft/soft) in October; should have more to offer over middle distances as a 3yo and he needs a close look on his return; gelded since his last run."

        "spotlight": "7,000gns foal, 10,000gns yearling; third foal; gelded half-brother to 1m-1m3f winner Sea Spray (including Scandinavia; RPR 80); dam Listed-placed 1m2f/1m4f winner (103), out of 1m3f winning sister to German 1m6f Listed winner Poseidon Adventure; yard 0-15 in novice events last year and he's probably one for later on."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-6.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished last on Bath debut (1m, good to soft; 4-1) in October, but after wind surgery he showed some ability when fourth at Kempton (1m, AW) in December; returns after another break but he has plenty of stamina in his pedigree and is open to more progress on this step up in trip; in the mix with tongue-tie added."

        "spotlight": "Attracted support into 17-2 on recent Bath debut (1m2f, good) but he was always in rear and trailed home in a remote seventh of eight."

  {
    "course": "Kempton (AW)",

    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",

        "edge": "-15.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Kingman filly; dam 7f-1m2f scorer (including Listed; RPR 102), sister to 1m2f AW winners Suitor and Plead, half-sister to winners Golden Horde (Commonwealth Cup), Camille Pissarro (7f 2yo Group 1) and Line Of Departure (6f Listed); notable connections; interesting debutante."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Star Baby",
        "jockey": "Hector Crouch",
        "trainer": "Ed Walker",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "-",
