        "dam_sire": "Le Havre",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "54.5",
        "model_pct": "12.1%",
        "fair_odds": "8.23",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "32,000gns foal, 75,000euros yearling; by Zoustar out of French 9.5f/1m2f AW winner (including Listed; RPR 94); will act well on the surface if taking after her dam; the betting may offer further guidance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Merry",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "James Horton",
        "ts": "49",
        "rpr": "72",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "3-4",

        "dam_sire": "Mount Nelson",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "54.1",
        "model_pct": "11.8%",
        "fair_odds": "8.49",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has made the frame in 7f contests at Kempton and Southwell; not crying out for this extra furlong judged on pedigree but she is the form pick; admittedly sets only an ordinary standard."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Zarique",
        "jockey": "Saffie Osborne",
        "trainer": "Owen Burrows",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "52.7",
        "model_pct": "10.8%",

        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-7.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Newcomer by Zarak and first foal of 7f/1m-winning (including US; RPR 96) daughter of French Listed-placed 1m4f scorer; in good hands; heed the market signals."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Lightning Glory",

        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",

        "fair_odds": "13.49",

        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "5,000euros foal, 1,200euros yearling, 165,000euros (breeze-up) 2yo; by Cotai Glory; dam unplaced 7f/1m AW 2yo (RPR 60), half-sister to useful US 1m/1m1f winner K P All Systems Go; one of several newcomers in the field; market informative."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Premier Cru (GB)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "29",
        "rpr": "68",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "56",
        "sire": "Nathaniel",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "46.4",
        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.90",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed some promise with fifth of 13 over C&D, then raced freely and looked a non-stayer over 1m2f at Yarmouth; may show progress returned to this scenario with hood applied."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Sharp Romance",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Philip McBride",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "61",

        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "45.3",

        "fair_odds": "14.86",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-7.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Shaped encouragingly with fourth of 11, best of the newcomers, in 1m event at Yarmouth; recorded a modest RPR but may improve with the experience under her belt; out of an AW scorer."
      },
      {

  {
    "course": "Southwell (AW)",
    "time": "19:00",
    "race_name": "Follow @attheraces On X Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "AW",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Standard",
    "class": "Class 4",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "King Of Ithaca",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "James Tate",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "1-6458",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Exceed And Excel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "55.4",
        "model_pct": "22.0%",
        "fair_odds": "4.54",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+4.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "6-31 on AW, four of those wins gained over C&D and the most recent a ready success from a 1lb lower mark last December; failed to settle on outer when only eighth of 12 (Jersey Maverick sixth, State of Madness ninth) at Kempton three weeks ago; others arrive in better form."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Commander Of Life",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Jessica Macey",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "80",
        "form": "224243",
        "sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "dam_sire": "Acclamation",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "54.6",
        "model_pct": "18.9%",
        "fair_odds": "5.30",
        "best_dec": "5.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last win came on Chelmsford Polytrack (7f; from 4lb lower) last October; kept in decent form (4224243) this year, a sticking-on third at Nottingham (8.5f, good) 12 days ago to Saturday's Ripon scorer Highland Olly; Paul Mulrennan is a noted booking."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Jersey Maverick",
        "jockey": "Mikkel Mortensen(5)",
        "trainer": "Charlie Fellowes",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "9542-6",
        "sire": "Kodi Bear",
        "dam_sire": "Consolidator",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "54.1",
        "model_pct": "17.2%",
        "fair_odds": "5.80",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "+8.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Sole win at Epsom (7f, good to firm; from 8lb lower) last July; fine on AW, as shown with near miss at Kempton (7f; beaten a neck) last October; sixth - faring best of the three involved in this race - in recent 7f Class 5 at Kempton; may strip fitter, with Mikkel Mortensen's 5lb claim handy."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Jimmy Speaking",
        "jockey": "Silvestre De Sousa",
        "trainer": "Chris Dwyer",
        "ts": "58",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3700-1",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-11",
        "score": "53.9",
        "model_pct": "16.7%",
        "fair_odds": "6.00",
        "best_dec": "2.25",
        "edge": "-27.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well backed at Doncaster (7f Class 4, good to soft) just over a month ago and that support was justified, as he drew clear of his 15 rivals; 4lb higher but no issues with AW and this long home straight should play to his strengths; the one to beat and he has Silvestre De Sousa in the saddle."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Packetofbiscuits",
        "jockey": "Alistair Rawlinson",
        "trainer": "John Mackie",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "311250",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "12.2%",
        "fair_odds": "8.18",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-0.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner twice in February, before only just failing to catch the winner back here in hat-trick bid; work to do with Jimmy Speaking from Doncaster (fifth), with recent Thirsk effort - last of 12 - hardly a ringing endorsement."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "State Of Madness",
        "jockey": "Jack Mitchell",
        "trainer": "Mark Loughnane",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "73",
        "form": "4-3259",

        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "51.3",
        "model_pct": "10.0%",
        "fair_odds": "10.05",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Three wins (form figures 1121432) for Charlie Clover, ending his time with that trainer with a narrow defeat here (6f) in February; high in the weights for this trainer (0-2) as a result, only ninth of 12 after an early stumble at Kempton (7f) latest."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Sunriseontheboyne",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Ben Haslam",
        "ts": "45",
        "rpr": "89",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "71-980",
        "sire": "Cotai Glory",
        "dam_sire": "Born To Sea",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "45.2",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "33.48",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three on AW at Dundalk (7f-1m) for Mick Mulvany and ended his time for that County Meath handler with a heavy-ground win at Listowel (1m; 13-2) last September; low-key in three starts for Ben Haslam, last of 12 over 1m2f at Doncaster on latest start; mark is beginning to ease."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Struggled in two of four runs as 3yo but won a Hamilton handicap (6f, good to soft) on penultimate start; lightly raced 4yo who is a half-brother to an AW winner; creditable fourth of six at Pontefract (6f, good) on Wednesday."

        "spotlight": "All four wins have been on AW, two over C&D; has had some ups and downs since his last success in September but went very close at Kempton last month and runner-up off this mark over C&D last time; shortlisted."

        "spotlight": "Won a Racing League handicap off this mark last summer; three solid efforts this year, including a third at Newcastle (6f, Tapeta) last month and a close fourth in big field at Ripon two weeks ago; remains lightly raced on AW and he's a key player back in this sphere."

        "spotlight": "Off the mark at the 11th attempt when landing a Chepstow maiden (6f, soft) in September but that was a golden opportunity and he struggled back in a handicap in his final run last season; drops back in grade on his return but he has a patchy profile and others are more convincing."

        "spotlight": "Won at Sandown (7f, good to soft) in August 2023 but unplaced in 13 starts since and last of 12 here (7f) in January; mark continues to fall but he has a lot to prove back in trip after a break; regular hood removed."

        "spotlight": "Ran well in face of a stiff task in a Carlisle Listed event last summer; backed that up with a close third in a Thirsk handicap (7f, good) but she's lost her way in three subsequent runs; should be fine on this drop back in trip but she needs a major revival on this second run after a break."
      }
    ]

        "cd": "",
